en: Shout for joy in the LORD, O you righteous! Praise befits the upright.
zh: 義人哪！你們要靠著耶和華歡呼； 正直人讚美主是合宜的。

en: Give thanks to the LORD with the lyre; make melody to him with the harp of ten strings!
zh: 你們要彈琴稱謝耶和華， 用十弦瑟歌頌他。

en: Sing to him a new song; play skillfully on the strings, with loud shouts.
zh: 你們要向他唱新歌， 在歡呼聲中巧妙地彈奏。

en: For the word of the LORD is upright, and all his work is done in faithfulness.
zh: 因為耶和華的話是正直的， 他的一切作為都是誠實的。

en: He loves righteousness and justice; the earth is full of the steadfast love of the LORD.
zh: 耶和華喜愛公義和公正， 全地充滿耶和華的慈愛。

en: By the word of the LORD the heavens were made, and by the breath of his mouth all their host.
zh: 諸天藉著耶和華的話而造， 天上的萬象藉著他口中的氣而成。

en: He gathers the waters of the sea as a heap; he puts the deeps in storehouses.
zh: 他把海水聚集成壘 ， 把深海安放在庫房中。

en: Let all the earth fear the LORD; let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of him!
zh: 願全地都敬畏耶和華， 願世上的居民都懼怕他。

en: For he spoke, and it came to be; he commanded, and it stood firm.
zh: 因為他說有，就有； 命立，就立。

en: The LORD brings the counsel of the nations to nothing; he frustrates the plans of the peoples.
zh: 耶和華破壞列國的謀略， 使萬民的計劃挫敗。

en: The counsel of the LORD stands forever, the plans of his heart to all generations.
zh: 耶和華的謀略永遠立定， 他心中的計劃萬代長存。

en: Blessed is the nation whose God is the LORD, the people whom he has chosen as his heritage!
zh: 以耶和華為 神的，那國是有福的； 耶和華揀選作自己產業的，那民是有福的。

en: The LORD looks down from heaven; he sees all the children of man;
zh: 耶和華從天上觀看， 他看見全人類。

en: from where he sits enthroned he looks out on all the inhabitants of the earth,
zh: 從自己的住處， 他察看地上所有的居民。

en: he who fashions the hearts of them all and observes all their deeds.
zh: 他是那創造眾人的心， 了解他們一切作為的。

en: The king is not saved by his great army; a warrior is not delivered by his great strength.
zh: 君王不是因兵多得勝， 勇士不是因力大得救。

en: The war horse is a false hope for salvation, and by its great might it cannot rescue.
zh: 想靠馬得勝是枉然的； 馬雖然力大，也不能救人。

en: Behold, the eye of the LORD is on those who fear him, on those who hope in his steadfast love,
zh: 耶和華的眼睛看顧敬畏他的人， 和那些仰望他慈愛的人；

en: that he may deliver their soul from death and keep them alive in famine.
zh: 要搭救他們的性命脫離死亡， 使他們在饑荒中可以存活。

en: Our soul waits for the LORD; he is our help and our shield.
zh: 我們的心等候耶和華， 他是我們的幫助、我們的盾牌。

en: For our heart is glad in him, because we trust in his holy name.
zh: 我們的心因他歡樂， 因為我們倚靠他的聖名。

en: Let your steadfast love, O LORD, be upon us, even as we hope in you.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你照著我們所仰望你的， 向我們施慈愛。
